creator: dinoex@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback


a) Your program does not use the regex. 

Try to change your code: 

- a = doc.match(reg) 
+ a = reg.match(doc) 

b) it looks like the problem is related to encoding of the website. 

with ruby18: 
nil 

with ruby19: 
1:4: warning: variable $KCODE is no longer effective; ignored 
1:10:in `gsub!': incompatible encoding regexp match (UTF-8 regexp with Windows-1251 string) (Encoding::CompatibilityError) 
from 1:10:in `<main>' 

The data is in "windows-1251" not in "UTF8". 
Beside this the code does return here after some longer time. 

$ time ruby test.rb 
nil 
5600.459u 0.000s 2:01:05.23 77.0%       6+1478k 0+0io 0pf+0w
